sword_shield.description: Frontline shield hero focused on block and formation anchoring.

spear.description: Anti-cavalry spear hero with disciplined reach control.

two_handed_sword.description: Heavy two-handed duelist hero built for burst melee pressure.

bow.description: Long-range bow hero specialized in sustained ranged pressure.

javelin.description: Armor-piercing ranged hero specialized in anti-armor strikes.

beast_master.description: Ranged command hero that directs hound pressure on enemy backlines.

super_priest.description: Elite support hero focused on blessing coverage and morale sustain.

super_fanatic.description: Zealot support hero with aggressive sustain through life-leech combat.

super_knight.description: Shock cavalry hero optimized for movement and moving-impact damage.
